sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, text STRING);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'hello world'), (2, 'duckdb database');
SELECT id, text, instr(text, 'db') AS position FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET text = 'fuzz testing with duckdb' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, instr(text, 'test') AS position FROM test_strings WHERE instr(text, 'db') > 0;
